news-global-econ.title: I’m a university president. Trump is right to make colleges deliver for students
news-global-econ.description: The Department of Education proposes requiring colleges to prove graduates outearn high school graduates or risk losing federal student loan access.

news-global-econ.title: Half of British Public Want Prime Minsiter Starmer to Resign Amid Rolling Mandelson-Epstein Scandal
news-global-econ.description: The clock appears to be ticking on the scandal-ridden government of Prime Minister Sir Keir Starmer, with half of the UK public believing he should resign, as controversy reigns over his decision to appoint Lord Peter Mandelson as ambassador to the United Sta…

news-global-econ.title: The great wealth lie: Millennials are richer than you or they think
news-global-econ.description: Baby boomers still control over $85 trillion in wealth, but millennials are catching up faster than any generation with a 374% surge since 2019.

news-global-econ.title: JSW Motors plans to open own showrooms before India car debut
news-global-econ.description: JSW Motors plans to establish four experience centers in major Indian cities like Mumbai, New Delhi, and Ahmedabad before launching its first product in the second half of the year

news-global-econ.title: How Trump survives: Battling the media, former allies and assassination attempts
news-global-econ.description: President Trump faces mounting political problems including low poll numbers and an unpopular war, but his survival of a third assassination attempt fuels empathy from opponents.

news-global-soc.title: Clearing Corporation revamps trade reporting system, including offshore rupee
news-global-soc.description: The revamp is aimed at reporting more details of trades and to create a more uniform format aligned with standards used elsewhere

news-global-soc.title: DeepSeek slashes fees for new AI model in Chinese price war
news-global-soc.description: The Hangzhou-headquartered AI lab is offering a 75 per cent discount to developers using the DeepSeek-V4-Pro, released last week

news-global-soc.title: Emerging stocks rise to record high on AI, Iran’s Hormuz offer
news-global-soc.description: Easing West Asia tensions have bolstered sentiment thanks to an extended US-Iran ceasefire, while a developing-market currency gauge rose around 0.3%

news-global-soc.title: Democrat Pushes 'Military-Grade Weapons' Ban After WHCD Handgun/Shotgun Attack
news-global-soc.description:
Pennsylvania state Rep. and former Democratic Party Vice Chair Malcolm Kenyatta pushed a ban on "military-grade weapons" after the handgun/shotgun attack that occurred at the White House Correspondents' Dinner.
The post Democrat Pushes ‘Military-Grade Weapons…

news-global-soc.title: Sun Pharma inks agreement to buy US-based Organon for $11.75 billion
news-global-soc.description: The transaction has been approved by the boards of both Sun Pharma and Organon, and is expected to close in early 2027, pending closing conditions such as regulatory and Organon shareholder approvals
